title: AWS SWE Intern 2026
summary: Worked on internal AWS operations tooling across account investigation, production debugging workflows, and low-level runtime observability.

sections.heading: What I worked on
items: integrated account-visibility APIs into ops platform for on-call engineers and AI agents
converted frequently requested account-investigation workflows into safe, validated CLI tools
added descriptive command interfaces, input validation, and risk classification around account-data APIs
reduced the risk of malformed manual requests and standardized production debugging workflows
implemented a lock-free backtrace capture API for Tokio using libunwind through FFI
captured raw instruction pointers while deferring symbolization to callers to avoid global-lock contention
